唔該晒巴打你. 其實而家仲係三心兩意咁.
想問下入境英國係咪好麻煩? 今日啱啱換咗2K 英嫎, 1K歐羅. 14日應該夠洗呱?
而家諗咁三個選擇
1) 倫敦 > 巴黎 , 我驚倫敦入境麻煩. 拒絕我入境就PK了. 楂BNO,
2) 巴黎 > 倫敦 , 巴黎治安係咪好差> 我已經換咗30K 港紙CASH, 第一站萬一俾人搶晒會好金
3) 靜係喺倫敦

暫時plan 咗大約咁樣:

Day1 (Mon) :7:00 落機 > 出市區 Piccadaily 食早餐> 12:00 hostel check in > Camden Market > 黃昏去King Cross 打咭(哈利波特取景)

Day2 (Tue) : 大英博物館 10:00-5:30 (D 人話一日睇唔晒?) > Convent Garden (ben’s cookies, whittard of Chelsea 係咪好出名? )

Day3(wed): Westminster Cathedral > buckingham palace睇交接 > Horse Guards parade > St James's Palace > Westminster Abbey > Big Ben > NO.10 Downing Street > St. Martin in the Fields > Charing Cross Road > 唐人街 > Lego 旗艦店 >

Day4 (Thu) : Sherlock Holmes Museum > 杜莎夫人蠟像館(呢個值唔值得去?) > Regent Street > Oxford Street > Royal academy of arts > Fortnum & Mason下午茶(係咪要等好耐?)

Day5 (Fri) : Oxford (想問下睇唔睇到一日?

Day6 (Say): Cambridge (想問下睇唔睇到一日?值唔值得去? 去咗oxford 去cambridge 係咪好無謂? )

Day7 (Sun) : notting hill > Kensington Palace > kensington Gardens & Hyde park > Victoria & Albert Museum (呢個值唔值得去?) > Harroads 百貨 > London Eye > 水族館 > Royal Festival Hall > Somerset House > Royal Courts > 買 Twinings Tea > Temple Church > Museum of London

Day 9 (Mon) : Observatory Greenwich > Queen's House > National Maritime Museum > Greenwich Market > Greenwich Foot Tunnel > tower of London > HMS belfast > The Shard > Golden Hinde > London Bridge > Royal Exchange > St. Paul Cathedral > Millennium Bridge > Shakespeare's Globe

Day 10(Tue): Windsor Castle > St. George’s Chapel > Eton College > 倫放 > 巴黎

巴黎:
Day11 (wed) 羅浮宮 > Sainte-Chapelle 聖徒禮拜堂 > 聖母院 > 聖心堂 >
Day12 (Thu) 梵爾賽宮
Day13 (Fri) : 未plan 好
Day14 (Sat) : 未plan 好, 8PM上機
